_comment: Reference map of Recall's API Gateway (REST) routes -> Lambdas. This documents the wiring you build in the console (docs/phase5-polish-deploy.md). All routes use Lambda PROXY integration, so each Lambda receives the raw event and returns its own statusCode/headers/body (including the CORS headers). Enable CORS on each resource (adds the OPTIONS method). Deploy to the 'prod' stage; the invoke URL becomes VITE_API_BASE_URL.

api.name: recall-api
api.cors: enabled on every resource (OPTIONS) + CORS headers returned by each Lambda

routes.purpose: Upload a file -> S3 + DynamoDB; returns { documentId }
List all documents (DynamoDB Scan) for the sidebar
Ask a question -> embed -> Pinecone -> Claude -> { answer, citations[] }

notes: recall-process has NO API route — it is triggered by the S3 ObjectCreated event, not HTTP.
After deploying, set the frontend's VITE_API_BASE_URL to https://{api-id}.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod and VITE_USE_MOCK=false.
